



```{r}

library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

data <- read_xlsx("干燥度.xlsx", sheet = 1)

data <- data[,-1]

didian <- read_xlsx("地点_总.xlsx") |> 
  select('FID','NAME')


data2 <- inner_join(data,didian,by = 'NAME')


AI <- pivot_longer(data2,
                     cols = -c('NAME','FID'),       # 除year外均转换
                     names_to = "year",
                     values_to = "AI")

AI <- AI |> 
  select('FID','NAME','year','AI') |> 
  rename(station = NAME)

writexl::write_xlsx(AI, "1-AI.xlsx")

```
